name: Create Jira Ticket
description: Creates a ticket in Jira with given name and description

inputParameters.name: ProjectKey
inputParameters.label: Project Key
inputParameters.description: The Project Key (first part of the ticket number, e.g. PROJ in PROJ-123)

inputParameters.name: TicketName
inputParameters.label: Ticket Name
inputParameters.description: The title of the Jira ticket to create

inputParameters.name: TicketDescription
inputParameters.label: Ticket Description
inputParameters.description: The description of the Jira ticket to create

outputParameters.name: TicketNumber
outputParameters.label: Ticket Number
outputParameters.description: The ID of the Jira ticket that was created (e.g. PROJ-123)

outputParameters.name: TicketUrl
outputParameters.label: Ticket Url
outputParameters.description: The URL of the Jira ticket that was created
